sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115256" key="yaqa/llw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψᾰθάλλω</orth>, <sense id="n115256.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scratch, rub,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σὺ δὲ τὴν κεφαλὴν ψάθαλλέ μου</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scratch</tr_> my head, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">78</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
